channel.title: Talk on What's done is done
channel.description: Recent content in Talk on What's done is done

item.title: openSUSE mini Summit 2018
item.description:
I had a talk at the openSUSE mini Summit 2018 about my private cloud. I had build this for my personal testing. This cloud is enough for my use but it’s costy for running due to the electricity. So, I’m thinking to use more efficient machines like Raspberry Pi or something like that. I think NUC boxes are better but costy for the initial cost..

Happy Hacking!
